page: Microsoft Azure EC48es_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECEV6 server family. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance persistent disks. There are no onboard GPUs, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the EC48es_v6 provides a high density of memory relative to its compute resources, making it a specialized option for memory-bound workloads rather than general-purpose compute. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive workloads, including large relational databases, in-memory caching layers, and enterprise resource planning systems.
description: The Microsoft Azure EC48es_v6 is a memory-optimized server instance from the ECEV6 family, designed for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity. Powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture, the instance provides 48 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. It operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This virtual machine does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external storage attachments. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation, the EC48es_v6 is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound applications. It is suited for workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and enterprise applications that demand consistent memory performance without the need for local physical disks or GPU acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC48es_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring forty-eight dedicated vCPUs and three hundred eighty-four gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
